languages.text: "Прошу прощения, Ваша Светлость, но если вы падете, никакого искупления нам уже не видать".
"I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."
languages.original_text: "Прошу прощения, Ваша Светлость, но если вы падете, никакого искупления нам уже не видать".

traits.locale_text: "I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."
"I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."
"I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, the soul of the regiment dies with you. There is no better way to protect it than to protect you."
"I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."
"I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."

languages.text: 「申し訳ございません、御{mf|殿|殿}様。もし御{mf|殿|殿}様がお亡くなりになられたら、この連隊の魂も御{mf|殿|殿}様と共に消えてしまいます。御{mf|殿|殿}様を守ることで、連隊を守る最善の方法なのです。」
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, the soul of the regiment dies with you. There is no better way to protect it than to protect you."

traits.locale_text: 「申し訳ございません、御{mf|殿|殿}様。もし御{mf|殿|殿}様がお亡くなりになられたら、この連隊の魂も御{mf|殿|殿}様と共に消えてしまいます。御{mf|殿|殿}様を守ることで、連隊を守る最善の方法なのです。」

languages.text: "Özür dilerim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri ama eğer ölürseniz hiçbirimiz kefarete kavuşamayız."
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."

traits.locale_text: "Özür dilerim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri ama eğer ölürseniz hiçbirimiz kefarete kavuşamayız."

languages.text: «Lo lamento, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero si usted cae, no habrá ninguna expiación para nosotros».
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."

traits.locale_text: «Lo lamento, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero si usted cae, no habrá ninguna expiación para nosotros».

languages.text: “请原谅我的失礼，大人，但如果您倒下了，我们就再也没有赎罪的机会了。”
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."

traits.locale_text: “请原谅我的失礼，大人，但如果您倒下了，我们就再也没有赎罪的机会了。”

languages.text: « Je vous prie de m'excuser, Votre Seigneurie, mais si vous périssez ici, aucun d'entre nous n'aura droit à l'expiation. »
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous prie de m'excuser, Votre Seigneurie, mais si vous périssez ici, aucun d'entre nous n'aura droit à l'expiation. »

languages.text: "Es tut mir leid, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, aber wenn Ihr fallt, gibt es für uns keine Erlösung."
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but if you fall, there will be no atonement for us."

traits.locale_text: "Es tut mir leid, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, aber wenn Ihr fallt, gibt es für uns keine Erlösung."
